perturbed_task_language: Pick the orange juice and place it in the basket
perturbation_semantics: object positions swapped vs base; orange_juice_1 and basket_1 localized purely from depth back-projection (no coords from state)

strategy_notes: Localized orange_juice_1 in agentview image_cam_00.png by scanning for orange/yellow RGB cluster: rows 97-115 col 140-150 showed RGB(137,98,7)/(140,60,13) (orange carton label) with vertical extent z=0 to z=0.135 — world xy = (-0.125, +0.06). After pre-positioning at (-0.125, 0.07, 0.22), wrist cam (world_wrist_01) confirmed OJ carton at world (-0.13, +0.06), top z=0.136 (matched ORANGE JUICE text visible on label). Pi0_pick succeeded in 7 chunks; wrist post-pick showed OJ held with 'ORANGE JUICE' label visible. Carried at z=0.26 across to basket xy, released, retreated — predicate fired during settle on retreat.
